texto: Born a slave, Harriet Tubman was determined not to remain one. She escaped from her owners in Maryland on the Underground Railroad in 1849 and then fearlessly returned thirteen times to help guide family members and others to freedom as the most famous conductor of the Underground Railroad.
explicacao: Citação de Susan Campbell Bartoletti sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “Born a slave, Harriet Tubman was determined not to remain one.
